# Server Configuration
server.port=8080

# Spring Boot Actuator Configuration
# Enable all actuator endpoints (health, info, metrics, etc.)
management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=*
# Enable health endpoint details (shows component status)
management.endpoint.health.show-details=always
# Enable health checks for disk space
management.health.diskspace.enabled=true
# Set disk space threshold (default is 10MB)
management.health.diskspace.threshold=10MB
# Enable ping health indicator
management.health.ping.enabled=true
# Enable application info
management.info.env.enabled=true

# Application Info (optional but useful for monitoring)
info.app.name=System Time Service
info.app.description=Service that provides current system time
info.app.version=1.0.0

# Additional useful configurations

spring.main.banner-mode=console
# Enable shutdown endpoint for graceful shutdown (optional)
management.endpoint.shutdown.enabled=true
